heading: Gift tax returns
label: 6019 Gift tax returns
notes: Amendments2010— amended section to read as if amendment by , had never been enacted. See 2001 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 111–312Pub. L. 107–16, § 542(b)(2)2001—, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted subsec. (a) heading “In general”, and added subsec. (b), which related to statements to be furnished to certain persons.Pub. L. 107–16, § 542(b)(2)1997—Par. (3). added par. (3).Pub. L. 105–341981— struck out subsec. “(a) In general” designation, substituted “calendar year” for “calendar quarter” and “year” for “quarter” wherever appearing, inserted in provision designated par. (1) reference to subsec. (e) of section 2503, added par. (2), and deleted provision respecting transfers by gift other than qualified charitable transfers, repealed subsec. (b) setting forth return requirement and definition of qualified charitable transfer, and repealed subsec. (c) setting forth cross reference to section 2515(c) relating to tenancy by the entirety.Pub. L. 97–341970—Subsec. (a). substituted “Any individual who in any calendar quarter makes any transfers by gift (other than transfers which under section 2503(b) are not to be included in the total amount of gifts for such quarter and other than qualified charitable transfers) shall make a return for such quarter with respect to the gift tax imposed by subtitle B” for “Any individual who in any calendar year makes any transfers by gift (except those which under section 2503(b) are not to be included in the total amount of gifts for such year) shall make a return with respect to the gift tax imposed by subtitle B”.Pub. L. 91–614Subsecs. (b), (c). added subsec. (b) and redesignated former subsec. (b) as (c).Pub. L. 91–614

Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to estates of decedents dying, and transfers made after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective and Termination Dates of 2010 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 111–312section 301(e) of Pub. L. 111–312section 121 of this titleDec. 31, 2009

Effective Date of 2001 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to estates of decedents dying after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 107–16section 542(f)(1) of Pub. L. 107–16section 121 of this titleDec. 31, 2009

Effective Date of 1997 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–34, title XIII, § 1301(b)111 Stat. 1039Aug. 5, 1997“The amendment made by this section [amending this section] shall apply to gifts made after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Aug. 5, 1997

Effective Date of 1981 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to gifts made after , see sections 403(e)(2) and 442(e) of , set out as a note under sections 2056 and 2501 of this title, respectively.Pub. L. 97–34Pub. L. 97–34Dec. 31, 1981

Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by applicable with respect to gifts made after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–614section 102(e) of Pub. L. 91–614section 2501 of this titleDec. 31, 1970

children.text: a transfer which under subsection (b) or (e) of section 2503 is not to be included in the total amount of gifts for such year,
a transfer of an interest with respect to which a deduction is allowed under section 2523, or

children.label: i
children.text: such transfer is of the donor’s entire interest in the property transferred, and

children.label: ii
children.text: no other interest in such property is or has been transferred (for less than adequate and full consideration in money or money’s worth) from the donor to a person, or for a use, not described in subsection (a) or (b) of section 2522, or

children.label: B
children.text: such transfer is described in section 2522(d),
